---
title: "Sending a welcome message to the user"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{sending-a-welcome-message-to-the-user}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(squirrels)
```

<!-- WARNING - This vignette is generated by {fusen} from dev/flat_get_welcome_message_benoit.Rmd: do not edit by hand -->

A small function to welcome the user with a message including a provided date.


# get_welcome_message_benoit

```{r examples-get_welcome_message_benoit}
get_welcome_message_benoit("02/01/1997")

```
